steps.title: Spot the incompatibility
steps.content: Kepler-1552b is habitable but too distant to access. This incompatibility demands a shift to a different approach.

steps.title: Choose the transition
steps.content: ”Instead” expresses the logical substitution—shifting focus from the impractical distant planet to nearby alternatives. The other three misrepresent this relationship by suggesting exemplification, similarity, or mere sequence respectively. That matches choice C — C is correct.
